svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="ES 统一搜索" id="es-search"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-127" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="ES 统一搜索:4 模块 CompletableFuture 并行 + 双管线同步 + 优雅降级" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="统一搜索请求" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="goods
商品" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="320" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="circlePosts
圈子帖" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="320" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="shops
店铺" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="320" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="jointCards
套卡" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="320" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PARA" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="CompletableFuture 并行
ik_smart 分词
title^3 权重
深分页 p*ps≥10000 报错" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="470" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="合并结果" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="720" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="全空 → 回退
租户 6 个商品推荐" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="720" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SYNC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="数据同步双管线:Logstash 每 30s 游标增量 + RabbitMQ 实时增量(带 traceId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="600" x="200" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="G"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="C"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="S"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="J"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="G" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="R"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="R"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="REC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
